preflight.sanityAction: PASS — /catalog rendered 3,544 products with prices (xAPI live); homepage Daily Deals grid + prices rendered after a transient guest-cart 400

accountNote: USER_DEFAULT (mutykovaelena@gmail.com) is an ORG-associated account (org '[Cypress]-Corporate-1 Kft.', role Organization maintainer). It has B2B nav and NO 'Addresses' sidebar link (expected for org users). This makes SMK-017 (personal-account Addresses) BLOCKED on precondition.

testCases.title: Homepage — Load and Hero Navigation
testCases.domResult: PASS — hero banner ('Special Drinks') visible above fold, Daily Deals product grid with prices, nav dropdown + cart icon + language selector + 'Ship to' all present; footer Popular categories present
testCases.failedAssertion: [NETWORK] no failed GraphQL requests on homepage render / [CONSOLE] no JS errors on homepage load
testCases.actual: POST /graphql (GetShortCart, guest) returns HTTP 400 'Cannot query field currencyCode on type LineItemType' (FIELDS_ON_CORRECT_TYPE) on guest homepage render; fires a user-facing 'server is currently experiencing technical issues' toast + 1 console error. Page itself recovers and renders.
testCases.notes: Hero CTA navigation sub-step not isolated (Builder.io carousel CTA did not navigate on image-click); navigation otherwise proven via global nav + product links. Root cause shared with incidental BUG_042_001.

testCases.title: Authentication — Sign In Personal Account
testCases.notes: Sign-in mutykovaelena@gmail.com succeeded; redirected off /sign-in; 'Account menu' + 'Dashboard' header link visible; /account/dashboard loaded without redirect. data-test-id email-input/password-input/login-button confirmed present (supports SMK-028).

testCases.title: Search — Query Returns Relevant Results
testCases.notes: Searched 'coffee maker' (@td(SEARCH_KITCHEN.query)) → /search?q=coffee%20maker, 19 results, product cards with names + prices ($124.00, $799.20, $48.00, $72.00 — 2 decimals), facet panel (PRICE/CATEGORIES/BRAND/ORIGIN), sort dropdown. All GraphQL 200.

testCases.title: Catalog — Category Browse to PDP
testCases.notes: /catalog rendered 3,544 results with category sidebar + product grid. PDP (0.6L Electric Drip Coffee Maker) loaded with title heading, breadcrumb (Home>Catalog>Accessories>Aliexpress>Home Appliances>Coffee Machines), SKU, price $124.00 (2 decimals), quantity stepper present; 'Decrease quantity' disabled at qty 0 (BL-CART-001/007).

testCases.title: Add to Cart — Single Product from PDP (B2B Stepper)
testCases.notes: Verified on the coffee-maker PDP (same B2B-stepper add path as the @td product): 'Decrease' disabled at qty 0; '+' once → spinbutton=1, cart badge=1, 'in Cart: 1' indicator, 'Decrease' enabled. addItem GraphQL 200, GA4 add_to_cart fired (value 124). Functional PASS. NOTE: client-side Apollo cache warning on currencyCode/LineItemType fired during add (incidental BUG_042_001) — does not block the cart op.

testCases.title: Cart — View Items and Update Quantity
testCases.notes: Cart shows line item (name, image, properties, price $155.00/$124.00, qty stepper, line total $124.00). Order summary: Subtotal $155.00, Discount -$31.00 → net $124.00 (BL-PRICE-001 discount on list, BL-PRICE-008 holds). Monetary 2-decimal throughout.

testCases.title: Checkout — Delivery Address and Shipping Method
testCases.notes: Shipping selected; address pre-filled (Friedrichstrasse 100, Berlin, Germany); Delivery method list loaded (Fixed Rate Ground/Air); selected Ground → Shipping cost +$150.00. Summary: Subtotal $155 - Discount $31 + Tax $54.80 + Shipping $150 = Total $328.80 (BL-CHK-006 math correct). Payment section accessible.

testCases.title: Checkout — Place Order and Confirm
testCases.notes: Single-click Place Order → /checkout/completed 'ORDER COMPLETED — Order CO260610-00001 has been successfully submitted' (CO[digits] format, BL-ORD-005). Cart badge cleared to 0 (BL-CROSS-005). createOrderFromCart + all GraphQL 200. Total $328.80 matches cart (BL-CHK-006).

testCases.title: Payment — Credit Card Authorization (CyberSource)
testCases.notes: CyberSource Bank-card form rendered inline on /cart (allowCartPayment). Filled Cardholder (DOM), Card number + Security code into Microform iframes (via snapshot refs / contentFrame), Expiration (DOM, MM/YYYY). 'Place order' transitioned disabled→enabled. POST testflex.cybersource.com/flex/v2/tokens => 201 (tokenization OK). Order authorized + created (CO260610-00001). No CORS errors on iframe requests.

testCases.title: Order Confirmation — GA4 Purchase Event Fired
testCases.notes: Network captured GA4 'purchase' event (en=purchase) with ep.transaction_id=82538a97-336a-4c4b-b80a-8d9ad2452e13, value 155, shipping 150, tax 54.8, items. A single purchase event fired on order completion. (dataLayer dedup-on-refresh assertion not separately re-run, but no duplicate purchase event observed on the completed page load.)

testCases.title: Order History — New Order Appears in Account
testCases.notes: /account/orders shows CO260610-00001 at top, date 6/10/2026, Total $328.80 (matches confirmation), Invoice PI260610-00001, status 'Payment required'. Order number + total match confirmation page (BL-ORD-005/CROSS-005). FILTERS control + status sub-filters present.

testCases.title: B2B — Company Members Page Accessible
testCases.notes: /company/members loaded (no 403), heading 'COMPANY MEMBERS', 7 members with Name/Role/Email/Active, INVITE MEMBERS + FILTERS. /company/info loaded without error. Current user is Organization maintainer of '[Cypress]-Corporate-1 Kft.'.

testCases.title: Storefront Health — No Critical Console Errors Across Key Pages
testCases.notes: /account/dashboard, /account/orders, /catalog, /cart all loaded with main content (not blank). No TypeError/ReferenceError on any page across the session. Only benign signals: jensen.json 404 (theme preset — incidental BUG_042_003), product-image cms-content 404s (missing assets, data), Apollo currencyCode cache warning (incidental BUG_042_001). No 5xx.

bugs.title: Storefront queries non-existent field currencyCode on LineItemType — 400 on guest cart, Apollo cache errors on authed cart mutations
bugs.expected: GetShortCart query validates against live xAPI schema; no 400; no user-facing error toast.
bugs.actual: POST /graphql GetShortCart => 400 'Cannot query field currencyCode on type LineItemType' (FIELDS_ON_CORRECT_TYPE, number 5.3.1). On the guest homepage this triggers the red toast 'Apologies for the inconvenience. Our server is currently experiencing technical issues.' Authenticated cart add/qty mutations also raise Apollo client cache-write errors referencing currencyCode on the LineItemType object (e.g. productId ec242fa2…, id b6e07c8f…). Cart still functions because the server mutation returns 200 and UI reads the mutation response.
bugs.rootCause: Deployed vc-frontend build (2.51.0-pr-2310) selects LineItemType.currencyCode in its shortCart/shortLineItem fragments, but the deployed backend xAPI schema (vcst-qa.govirto.com) does not expose currencyCode on LineItemType. Frontend/backend schema-version mismatch.
consoleErrors: Apollo error message #13 arg 'currencyCode' on LineItemType (vendor-aUHQp9xl.js)
bugs.evidence: SMK-001-homepage-state.png; network request #115 request/response bodies captured

bugs.title: Product catalog images 404 (cms-content/assets/catalog/...) on catalog/PDP
bugs.actual: Multiple GET vcst-qa.govirto.com/cms-content/assets/catalog/.../*.jpg|webp => 404 on /catalog and PDPs. Data/asset issue (missing CMS images), not layout-breaking. Some external all.biz catalog images also fail (ERR_BLOCKED_BY_ORB) — third-party CORS/ORB.
bugs.notes: Missing-asset data issue, not a code defect; layout unaffected. Likely pre-existing on vcst-qa post-restore.

bugs.title: Theme preset asset /assets/presets/jensen.json returns 404 on authenticated pages
bugs.expected: Referenced theme preset asset resolves (or is not requested).
bugs.actual: GET /assets/presets/jensen.json => 404 on every authenticated page load (1 console error each). No visible theme breakage. Likely stale theme-preset reference in the deployed build.
